title: 2Pcs Black Disposal Containers for Snap-Off Utility Knife 9mm Blade, Razor Blade Cutter Safe Storage Box for Workshop, Office, Crafting, Secure Disposal Solution
features: Safe Blade Snapping & Organized Storage - Features a built-in break-off slot for safely snapping dull 9mm utility blades while storing hundreds of snapped blades securely in the compact chamber.
Engineered Injury Prevention - Enclosed snapping mechanism and disposal slot minimize blade exposure, preventing accidental access to used sharp edges.
Compact & Portable Design: Lightweight 9cm/3.5in * 3.8cm/1.5in container fits easily in toolboxes, drawers, or workspaces.
Durable Plastic Build: Sturdy construction ensures long-lasting use without cracking.
Easy to Empty: Removable bottom panel allows quick, safe disposal of used blades.
description: Purpose Exclusive storage for broken 9mm utility blades, designed to safely isolate snapped blade fragments in work environments. Key Attributes All-Plastic Construction - 100% ABS plastic body (9cm x 3.8cm) with reinforced break-off slot Easy Usage Design - Single-chamber storage only accommodates snapped blades through top entry port (max. hundreds fragments) Controlled Breaking - Manually align blades with break-off notch to quick snap Secure Disposal - Enclosed base plate prevents accidental spillage; detachable bottom panel for authorized emptying Operation Guide *Insert dull blade horizontally into top slot *Press downward until clean break *Fragments collect in lower chamber *Empties blades fragments access bottom panel Critical Notice ⚠️ Not for New Blades - Storage cavity depth (9cm) cannot hold full-length blades ⚠️ Plastic-Only Break - Designed for pre-cut/dulled blades only ⚠️ Professional Use - Requires monthly inspection for stress marks near break notch Intended Use Ideal for construction crews, packaging stations, and workshops
